Query: Is it legal for the white bishop at c4 to move to (or capture) f7? Answer only yes or no
output:
<think>
The white bishop at c4 can move diagonally. f7 is on the diagonal from c4 (c4-d5-e6-f7). There are no pieces blocking this diagonal path. f7 has a black pawn, so this would be a capture. This is a legal move.
</think>
